top_signals.title: Prices for Iranian Oil Stranded at Sea Surge
top_signals.summary: Iranian oil supplies at sea are rising after Tehran ramped up exports during the interim peace deal with the United States, but sales have been slow as China's independent refiners have turned to cheaper crude from Iraq, the UAE and Qatar.The return of U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Statistical Notice 2026/07 -  Bank of England Levy: Notification Document Levy Year 2026/27
top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: 13 Russian Vessels Struck By Ukraine in Azov Sea
top_signals.summary: Ukraine struck 13 Russian vessels in the Sea of Azov on Friday, including 10 tankers, its drone forces commander said, part of Kyiv's major campaign aimed at enforcing a fuel crisis on Moscow's troops.A dry cargo ship and a ferry were among the targets as well…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pro Shop's Chad Mumm on 'Full Swing,' Golf in 2026
top_signals.summary: Chad Mumm, Co-Founder of Pro Shop and Producer of the Netflix series 'Full Swing,' talks about the world's number-one ranked golfer, Scottie Scheffler, missing the cut at the Scottish Open. He also discusses golf's surge in popularity and the anticipation for the upcoming season of 'Full Swing.' Mumm joins Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on Bloomberg's 'The Close.' (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Empery Digital offloads 1,400 bitcoins to help fund AI pivot, pay debt
top_signals.summary: Empery Digital used part of the proceeds for a 25% stake in an AI data center campus project.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Backpack joins race for 24/7 stock markets with tokenized equities
top_signals.summary: The launch comes as tokenized stocks become one of the fastest-growing corners of crypto, with exchanges and traditional finance firms racing to expand 24/7 trading.

top_signals.title: Iran hits back at Trump after insists truce over
top_signals.summary: Iran has insisted it has "kept its word" on a ceasefire with the U.S. after President Donald Trump insisted the truce was over but talks continued.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CATL takes 20% stake in graphite materials developer CarbonScape
top_signals.summary: Last year, the New Zealand-based company signed several agreements for  supply of renewable feedstock to its future biographite industrial plants in Europe and North America.

alerts.title: Police suspects Dutch hackers were involved in Odido breach
alerts.summary: The Dutch National Police (Politie) says it has found "strong indications" that Dutch hackers have been involved in a February breach at the telecommunications provider Odido. [...]
